name: latency-hunter-toolkit
description: Latency Hunter Toolkit — a quant-engineering Claude Code plugin for solo traders. Two skills: backtest-guard (回测照妖镜, backtest pitfall audit) and latency-audit (热路径猎手, C++ low-latency hot-path review). No alpha, no keys — engineering only.

plugins.name: latency-hunter
plugins.description: Quant engineering skills: backtest-guard + latency-audit. Audit your backtests for look-ahead / overfitting / cost bugs, and your C++ hot path for the lock contention, false sharing, allocations and syscalls that kill tail latency.
